working_description: Adults without current accepted photo ID
mechanisms_to_study: ID access, replacement cost, documentation requirements
research_safeguard: Do not infer prevalence from a selected senior sample.

working_description: People whose disability affects camera, document, kiosk, or mobility workflows
research_safeguard: Test with disabled participants and accessibility specialists.

working_description: People with cognitive, memory, or learning access needs
research_safeguard: Use WCAG 2.2 as design guidance, not a prevalence estimate.

working_description: Trans and gender-diverse adults whose appearance or records may not align
mechanisms_to_study: document matching, human scrutiny, automated estimation

working_description: Migrants and people using unfamiliar or nonstandard documents
research_safeguard: Separate legal eligibility from system support.

working_description: People who are homeless or unstably housed
mechanisms_to_study: document loss, address requirements, device access
research_safeguard: Avoid treating lack of ID as an individual failure.

working_description: People with older devices, weak connectivity, or low digital literacy
People who decline biometric or identity processing
Racialized and Indigenous people potentially affected by unequal error or scrutiny
mechanisms_to_study: algorithmic and human error, document access, enforcement

working_description: People in rural, remote, and northern communities
